reviews.comment:
El acceso es sobre colectora de tierra . Pensé que tenía un shop más grande para comer pero era más bien tipo kiosko y cafetería. Cargué nafta allí y terminé comiendo en la axion de al lado 🤷🏼‍♀️
No hay señal de celu casi, pero te ofrecen wifi libre para poder usar las apps.

(Translated by Google)
Access is via a dirt road. I thought it would have a bigger shop for food, but it was more like a kiosk and cafe. I filled up there and ended up eating at the Axion next door 🤷🏼‍♀️
There's almost no cell service, but they offer free Wi-Fi so you can use apps.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1103205321495883631/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNudk9QcDlRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Todos los ACA valen la pena.

(Translated by Google)
All ACAs are worth it.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1103205321495883631/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNINzgta2hnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Amplio, cómodo, excelente atención tanto de los playeros en los surtidores como en el Service Shop, baños limpios, pasamos un excelente rato antes de continuar nuestro viaje. Es muy recomendable.

(Translated by Google)
Spacious, comfortable, excellent service from both the attendants at the pumps and in the Service Shop, clean restrooms—we had a great time before continuing our trip. Highly recommended.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1103205321495883631/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQ3MEl1eUxREAE

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención, servicio, en playa muy predispuestos y en tienda también, un gusto parar y ser atendido de tal manera

(Translated by Google)
Excellent attention, service, very helpful on the beach and in the store as well, a pleasure to stop and be served in such a way

reviews.comment:

Large parking lot, clean restrooms, very good service.

reviews.comment:
Una vergüenza que siendo del automóvil club tenga solo una entrada a la estación.
El pobre cartel que tiene no se divisa de la ruta .
Pongan un poquito de onda.

(Translated by Google)
It's a shame that, being part of the automobile club, there's only one entrance to the station.
The poor sign it has can't be seen from the route.
Bring some fun to it.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1103205321495883631/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURMZ0lpNGpBRRAB

reviews.comment:
La ubicación y la atención son muy buenas, pero es una pena y no se entiende que sea de las estaciones no renovadas en cuanto al local de "Full". Es muy chiquito y tenía pocas cosas.

(Translated by Google)
The location and service are very good, but it's a shame and puzzling that the "Full" convenience store is one of the stations that hasn't been renovated. It's very small and had very few items.

reviews.comment:
El ingreso y egreso a la estación de servicio sigue siendo de ripio hasta retomar la RN14 los baños dejaban mucho que desear y había un baño químico móvil con escalera (personas mayores e inválidas abstenerse)

(Translated by Google)
The entrance and exit to the service station remains gravel until rejoining RN14; the bathrooms left much to be desired and there was a portable chemical toilet with a ladder (elderly and disabled people should refrain from using it).
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1103205321495883631/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNqdk5qVThnRRAB
